economic_notes: Wahpeton Dakota Developments LP and Wahpeton Dakota Developments Ltd. manage investments and rental properties. Tatanka Store operates as retail enterprise. COVID-19 impacted operations in March 2020 but total revenues were not negatively impacted. Dakota Nation is member of Prince Albert Grand Council (PAGC) and QBOW Child and Family Services Inc.
notes: Fiscal year 2020 (ended March 31, 2020). Audit report dated December 15, 2023 - significantly late, Dakota Nation was in breach of submission requirements. COVID-19 impacted operations. Net financial assets figure of $51,408 is the actual 2020 figure per statement of changes. Consolidated entities include Wahpeton Dakota Nation General, Enterprises (Tatanka Store), and Housing Program. Two GBEs accounted for by modified equity method: Wahpeton Dakota Developments LP and Wahpeton Dakota Developments Ltd. 19 housing units disclosed at nominal amount as fully amortized. Unrestricted operating deficit of -$1,351,903 at year end. TCA net book value taken from Schedule 1 total of $7,125,227 (2020 column).
